zh.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威爾士布洛可爾布洛可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil de Ferrers於1230年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，她的父親Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby38歲，母親Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby29歲。她於1247年9月21日之前與Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威尔士布洛可爾布洛可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybil de Ferrers于1230年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾时，她的父亲Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby38岁，母亲Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby29岁。她于1247年9月21日之前与Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla

It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil de Ferrers was born in 1230, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, was 38 and her mother, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, was 29. She married Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst before 21 September 1247. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil de Ferrers est née en 1230, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst avant 21 septembre 1247. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil de Ferrers 1230 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby 38 und ihre Mutter Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby 29. Sie hat vor 21. September 1247 Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Ferrers è nata il nel 1230 nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst prima del 21 settembre 1247. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil de Ferrersが1230年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derbyは38歳，母Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derbyは29歳であった。1247年9月21日以前にSir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil de Ferrers(이)가 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1247년 9월 21일 이전 Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Ferrers nasceu em 1230, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst antes 21 de setembro de 1247. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil de Ferrers родилась в 1230 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst перед 21 сентябрь 1247 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybil de Ferrers nació en 1230, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst antes de 21 de septiembre de 1247. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
